message:
wa-lr93: add restart_scheduler module

Automatic restart scheduling that finds optimal mux server restart
windows by combining hazard urgency, activity profiles, and cooldown
penalties. Supports Automatic, Advisory, and Manual modes.

22 unit tests covering scoring, EWMA, scheduling, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
